data.title: Abbott Laboratories' Q3 Earnings: Revenue And EPS Beat, Company Says Well-Positioned To Achieve Upper End Of Annual Forecast
data.description: Abbott Laboratories reported third-quarter 2024 sales of $10.64B, with Medical Devices leading 11.7% sales growth. Adjusted EPS of $1.21 beat analyst expectations. Full-year guidance was updated.
